query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a human knee or bent joint positioned next to textured fabric with a vertical seam, illuminated by green light on the left side and deep blue light on the right, with warm orange tones visible near the bottom edge, all set against a dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A highly blurred, abstract close-up of a human knee and adjacent fabric where extreme soft-focus and absent fine detail smear the subject into ambiguous, unrecognizable form, overrun by aggressively clashing deep blue, green, and orange hues that break natural color harmony and prioritize disorienting shape and color over representational clarity.
